providerSetup: Create a hosted staging Postgres database dedicated to the control plane.
evidenceRequired: Provider database identifier and sanitized successful hosted health gate output.
blockers.exitCriteria: Hosted control-plane database is reachable from GitHub Actions without local-only evidence.

blockers.action: Provision tenant database admin access for staging.
providerSetup: Create a hosted staging admin connection that can create/drop tenant databases.
evidenceRequired: Hosted tenant provision/delete test output and sanitized DB-per-tenant proof.
blockers.exitCriteria: Tenant DB creation, deletion, and isolation pass in hosted staging.

blockers.action: Set CONTROL_PLANE_DATABASE_URL in local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
providerSetup: Write the staging control-plane URL to the local secret file, then upload by secret name only.
evidenceRequired: Local secret files check PASS and GitHub secret name present.
blockers.exitCriteria: Secret exists locally and in GitHub without printing the value.

blockers.action: Set TENANT_DB_ADMIN_URL in local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
providerSetup: Write the staging tenant admin URL to the local secret file, then upload by secret name only.
evidenceRequired: Hosted strict live DB tests PASS.
blockers.exitCriteria: Tenant admin secret is available to hosted strict checks.

blockers.action: Set TENANT_DB_HOST in local secret pack and GitHub Actions.
providerSetup: Extract the staging tenant DB host from the provider without credentials.
evidenceRequired: Local secret files check READY and hosted tenant routing proof.
blockers.exitCriteria: Tenant DB host is present and matches the hosted tenant admin target.

blockers.action: Create staging Sentry or equivalent error-monitoring project.
providerSetup: Create a staging error-monitoring project with alert routing enabled.
evidenceRequired: Sanitized project reference and alert proof attached to hosted attestation.
blockers.exitCriteria: Error monitoring is a real hosted service, not a doc-only claim.

providerSetup: Write the staging DSN to the local secret file, then upload it to GitHub Actions.
blockers.exitCriteria: Hosted runtime can initialize observability without exposing the DSN.

providerSetup: Create an external uptime monitor pointed at the hosted staging /health endpoint.
evidenceRequired: Monitor URL, screenshot/log reference, and successful health gate.
blockers.exitCriteria: External uptime evidence exists outside local tests.

providerSetup: Write the uptime monitor URL to the local secret file, then upload it to GitHub Actions.
evidenceRequired: GateForge secret check READY and hosted attestation item PASS.
blockers.exitCriteria: Hosted gate can prove the configured uptime monitor.

providerSetup: Choose a monitored staging operations inbox.
evidenceRequired: Alert delivery proof in hosted evidence packet.
blockers.exitCriteria: Operational alerts have a human recipient.

providerSetup: Create a staging alert webhook destination in the team response channel.

blockers.action: Create Resend staging key or approved transactional email provider key.
providerSetup: Create a staging transactional email provider key with limited scope.
evidenceRequired: Provider test send and DNS posture evidence.
blockers.exitCriteria: Transactional email provider is real and testable in staging.

providerSetup: Write the staging provider key to the local secret file, then upload it to GitHub Actions.
blockers.exitCriteria: Hosted smoke can send or validate transactional email readiness.

blockers.action: Verify sender domain and set EMAIL_FROM.
providerSetup: Verify the sender domain/address with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC evidence.
evidenceRequired: SPF/DKIM/DMARC evidence and provider verified sender.
blockers.exitCriteria: Outbound transactional messages use a verified sender.

providerSetup: Choose a monitored support or founder reply-to address.
blockers.exitCriteria: Customer replies route to a monitored inbox.

providerSetup: Create a staging AI provider key with provider-side spend limits.
evidenceRequired: Provider-side cap proof and AI gateway hosted smoke evidence.
blockers.exitCriteria: AI provider access is capped and audited before GA.
